text.title: Hybrid Delivery Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator rejects artefacts that violate the schema or any forbidden pattern.

example.note: mode='hybrid' not in enum; workstream missing cadence/lead/rationale; governance.layer must be 'single'; handoffs empty; reporting missing fields.

list.item: workstreams count < 2 (single workstream is not hybrid).
